name: Zucchini Flower Taco
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the zucchini blossoms well, checking for insects.
2. Melt butter over medium heat in a pan.
3. Add the blossoms and cook, turning often, until wilted, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the pan.
4. Lay the tortilla flat in the pan and place the blossoms on half of the tortilla. Sprinkle with cheese.
5. Cook until the cheese melts. Place avocado slices on the cheese and fold the tortilla over the filling.
6. Slide the taco onto a plate and serve with salsa.
